name: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Pro 48 PoE
title: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Pro 48 PoE
title_extended: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Pro 48 PoE - 48x Gigabit Ethernet ports, 4 SFP+ Ports, 40x POE+ IEEE 802.3af/at, 8x 60W PoE++ IEEE 802.3bt output ports
short_description: 48x Gigabit Ethernet ports, 4 SFP+ Ports, 40x POE+ IEEE 802.3af/at, 8x 60W PoE++ IEEE 802.3bt output ports
description: 48x Gigabit Ethernet ports, 4 SFP+ Ports, 40x POE+ IEEE 802.3af/at, 8x 60W PoE++ IEEE 802.3bt output ports

detailed_description.heading: Ports and Connectivity
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Pro 48 PoE is a high-performance Layer 3 managed switch designed for enterprise networks, campuses, and high-density deployments where PoE power, bandwidth, and scalability are critical. It offers 48 Gigabit Ethernet RJ45 ports, including 40 PoE+ ports and 8 PoE++ ports, each supporting 1G/100M/10M speeds, enabling reliable connectivity for wireless access points, IP cameras, VoIP phones, and professional AV devices. For high-speed aggregation, the switch includes four 10G SFP+ ports that support both 10G and 1G fiber modules, providing low-latency uplinks to servers, core switches, or storage systems. The unit supports DC power backup, ensuring uninterrupted operation even in case of primary power source failure.

detailed_description.heading: Switching Performance
detailed_description.text: The USW-Pro-48-POE delivers enterprise-class performance with a switching capacity of 176 Gbps, total non-blocking throughput of 88 Gbps, and forwarding rate of 131 Mpps, enabling seamless full-speed communication across all ports. Its 16,000-entry MAC address table and 4 MB packet buffer ensure stable handling of large numbers of connected devices and sudden traffic bursts. Layer 3 capabilities include a local DHCP server, DHCP relay, inter-VLAN routing, and static routing. The L3 table supports 4,000 ARP entries and 1,000 IPv4 routes, allowing efficient internal traffic distribution without relying on external routers. Access control is enforced via IPv4 ACLs and MAC-based ACLs, with 128 rules available for each type.

detailed_description.heading: Power and Management
detailed_description.text: The USW-Pro-48-POE includes a 1.3-inch touchscreen for quick local monitoring and is managed via Ethernet through the UniFi Network application, version 5.10.5 or later, for centralized configuration, monitoring, and firmware updates. The USW-Pro-48-POE includes advanced protection and compliance features to ensure safe and reliable operation in demanding environments. The switch is equipped with enhanced ESD protection, capable of withstanding up to ±16 kV from air discharges and ±12 kV from direct contact, which safeguards sensitive electronic components during installation, maintenance, or when connecting network cables. It also meets NDAA requirements and holds internationally recognized certifications, including CE, FCC, IC, and Anatel, confirming compliance with safety, electromagnetic compatibility, and operational standards. These features make the device fully suitable for enterprise, commercial, and government deployments, where operational reliability, equipment safety, and regulatory compliance are critical.
